title: Elbaf Reveals Its Giants
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Franky, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Nami, Road, Chopper as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like that woman and the big guy are chasing after him!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: They've got the sunny too!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The sunny? This is unreal!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guess I've got no choice but to cut 'em up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hold on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They might know the masters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We have to think this through!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Look!! Our goal isn't that much further!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've just gotta book it!! Full Speed Ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet there's a village or something up here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If they catch us, it's all over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WARLAND - REALM OF THE DEAD

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't find these in the upper forest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Diga GA GA GA GA GA GA GA GA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their meat is to die for! I'm sure it'll please the straw hats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: All right! I caught a moose!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those weigh a ton though; how're we gonna carry it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm glad we made it in time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's showing, so there's no sun stone pinders*.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't embarrass me. We'll manage. This meat is for our Saviors!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On dressrosea in the new world, he got caught up in the schemes of former warlord Dolfamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A refresher on hairudin

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's it! We got it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: HEAVE HO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was ultimately rescued from total erasure by the straw hat pirates. He is now one of the seven captains of the straw hat grand fleet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No one...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: On ElBAF has to fear!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These upstairs are from the generation after Dorry and Brogy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The new Giant Pirates are here!!;)

dialogue.speaker: Road
dialogue.text: (Navigator) Road

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: (Captain) Haljrudin

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: (shipwright) Stansen

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their crew is made up of five members:

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: (ship doctor, Gerd

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: (COOK) Goldberg

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The seas around Elbaf

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: H-H-How is it, Robin-san?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I have no experience cutting women's hair...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I WAS NERVOUS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My chest is beating like a drum, even though I don't have a heart! Yoho Ho Ho Ho Ho!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Skull joke!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kya ha ha ha! You don't have a heart?! That goes against science!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It's super cute, Robw!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That look really takes me back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It really suits her. Good job, brook.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's perfect!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thanks, brook! <

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yoho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho Ho! You're welcome!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 48 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
